_comment: Agent registration block for Dr. D's openclaw.json. Model uses OpenAI (gpt-4o) via Dr. D's OpenAI OAuth subscription — this is the model provider configured in his OpenClaw instance.
notes: Model uses OpenAI (gpt-4o) via Dr. D's OpenAI subscription. web_fetch enabled for Google Calendar API reads. exec and browser denied for security. Telegram binding assumes Dr. D will interact via Telegram — update channel/accountId as needed.
